name: staff-ai
description: A growing team of AI staff — installable role-by-role. Each plugin represents a senior practitioner: strategist, advisor, coach, reviewer. Use only the roles you need.

plugins.name: ai-strategist
plugins.description: Socratic strategist that interviews you through the value → feasibility → sequencing → governance → execution framework and produces a board-ready AI-strategy slide outline. Treats safety, security, compliance, and operating governance as a full strategic pillar — not a footnote. For CTOs, CIOs, CISOs, CROs, transformation leaders, and interview candidates who need to articulate a real, operable AI strategy for a specific organization.
